Meridian
ProductLive SignalsManifestoPricing↳ styleguide
03pricing

Three tiers.
No surprise meter.

Pricing is per workspace, not per event. We don't penalize you for instrumenting more of your customer surface — that's the point.

↳ all prices USD · cancel anytime

Cell

One team, one warehouse.

$0

free during private beta

  • Up to 5M events / mo
  • One workspace
  • Up to 3 cohort definitions
  • Email signals
  • Community Slack

Instrument

The default tier for revenue ops.

recommended
$1,400/ month

5 seats included · billed quarterly

  • Unlimited events
  • Unlimited cohorts
  • Signal kernel with custom alerts
  • Workspace cache + replay window
  • Slack & PagerDuty integration
  • Direct line to a data engineer

Constellation

Multi-warehouse, multi-region.

Talk

annual contract · custom SLA

  • Everything in Instrument
  • Dedicated workspace cluster
  • SOC2 audit pack
  • SSO / SCIM
  • Quarterly calibration review
  • Named on-call engineer

We don't list per-event overage rates because we don't have any. If your workload outgrows a tier we will tell you, in writing, before we charge you anything beyond it.

Make the next
customer hour count.
